title: Oil slump amid signs of weak physical demand
section_path: Oil slump amid signs of weak physical demand
section_path_text: Oil slump amid signs of weak physical demand
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Signs of weak underlying demand saw further downward pressure on commodity markets. This offset a broader pick up in risk appetite following the US debt ceiling deal. Crude oil slumped amid signs of weakness in the physical market.
